---
title: "Desiderata"
subtitle: "From free-text notes to structured ontology"
toc: false
---

## MARC → ontology coverage

```{=html}
<table class="matrix">
<thead>
<tr><th>MARC field</th><th>Content</th><th>Target</th><th>Status</th></tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr><td>001</td><td>Record ID</td><td>NAF</td><td class="ok">mapped</td></tr>
<tr><td>100 / 700</td><td>Persons</td><td><code>foaf:Person</code> · NAF · VIAF · Wikidata</td><td class="ok">mapped</td></tr>
<tr><td>110 / 710</td><td>Corporate</td><td><code>foaf:Organization</code></td><td class="ok">mapped</td></tr>
<tr><td>151 / 951</td><td>Places</td><td>KIMA · <code>wdt:P625</code> · <code>wdt:P214</code> · <code>wdt:P1566</code></td><td class="ok">mapped</td></tr>
<tr><td>245 $a / $b</td><td>Titles</td><td><code>bibo:shortTitle</code> · <code>fabio:hasSubtitle</code></td><td class="ok">mapped</td></tr>
<tr><td>260c</td><td>Date</td><td><code>dcterms:created</code></td><td class="ok">mapped</td></tr>
<tr><td>041</td><td>Language</td><td><code>dcterms:language</code></td><td class="ok">mapped</td></tr>
<tr><td>650 / 651 / 695</td><td>Subjects</td><td><code>dcterms:subject</code></td><td class="ok">mapped</td></tr>
<tr><td>020 / 022</td><td>ISBN / ISSN</td><td><code>bibo:isbn</code> · <code>bibo:issn</code></td><td class="ok">mapped</td></tr>
<tr><td><strong>500</strong></td><td>General Note</td><td>—</td><td class="gap">white space</td></tr>
<tr><td><strong>915</strong></td><td>Haskama (extracted, internally unstructured)</td><td>—</td><td class="gap">white space</td></tr>
<tr><td><strong>912</strong></td><td>Chronogram (phrase, letters not parsed)</td><td>—</td><td class="gap">white space</td></tr>
<tr><td><strong>(none)</strong></td><td>Bowers sub-Manifestation (issue / state / cancel / variant)</td><td>—</td><td class="gap">white space</td></tr>
<tr><td>260b / 260f / 922 / 923</td><td>Publisher / printer</td><td>Authority (proposed)</td><td class="partial">partial</td></tr>
</tbody>
</table>
```

## Sized desiderata

| # | Transformation | Records in scope |
|---|---|---:|
| 1 | Parse MARC 500 → `paratext_events` | ~900 |
| 2 | Parse 915 haskama → (rabbi, place, date) | 2,259 |
| 3 | Parse 912 chronogram → phrase + letters + computed year | 5,351 |
| 4 | Cluster un-clustered records into Works | 6,056 |
| 5 | Extend place authority alignment | 205 → all-corpus |
| 6 | Build printer authority from 260f + 923 | ~506 → 150–200 distinct |
| 7 | Surface Item-level data (Footprints, NLI scans) | external |

## Worked example: one BHB note → JSON → LRMoo Turtle

```{=html}
<p style="color:#6b7280; font-size: 0.9rem;">BHB MBI-0146263 · Salonika 1594 · responsa of R. Samuel di Medina (Maharashdam) · MARC 500.</p>

<div class="three-col">
  <div>
    <h4>1. Raw 500-note</h4>
    <p class="he"><em>"בסימן קץ (בדפים קנז-קנח) נדפסה תשובה בעניין עבדים ושפחות של יהודה שמתגיירים. זה הנוסח המקורי. בחלק מהעותקים החליפו תשובה זו בשתי תשובות אחרות."</em></p>
    <p style="font-size: 0.85rem;"><em>"In siman 190 (folios 157–158) a responsum on the conversion of Jews' slaves was printed. That is the original text. In some copies this responsum was replaced by two other responsa."</em></p>
  </div>

  <div>
    <h4>2. Structured JSON</h4>
<pre><code>{
  "manifestation": {
    "id": "MBI-0146263",
    "place": {
      "kima": "https://data.geo-kima.org/...",
      "label_he": "שלוניקי",
      "label_en": "Salonika"
    },
    "year": 1594
  },
  "paratext_events": [{
    "type": "state",
    "scope": "in_some_copies",
    "scope_marker_he": "בחלק מהעותקים",
    "location_in_book": {
      "siman": 190, "folios": "157-158"
    },
    "change": {
      "verb": "replaced",
      "verb_marker_he": "החליפו",
      "original_unit": {
        "type": "responsum",
        "topic": "conversion of slaves"
      },
      "replacement_unit": {
        "type": "responsum", "count": 2
      }
    },
    "likely_motivation": "self_censorship",
    "evidence": {
      "source_field": "MARC_500",
      "record": "MBI-0146263"
    }
  }]
}</code></pre>
  </div>

  <div>
    <h4>3. LRMoo Turtle</h4>
<pre><code>@prefix lrmoo: &lt;.../lrmoo/&gt; .
@prefix crm:   &lt;.../cidoc-crm/&gt; .
@prefix mbi:   &lt;.../mbi/&gt; .

mbi:0146263
  a lrmoo:F3_Manifestation_Product_Type ;
  rdfs:label "Pisqei Maharashdam
    (Salonika 1594, original setting)"@en .

mbi:0146263_state1
  a lrmoo:F3_Manifestation_Product_Type ;
  crm:P130_shows_features_of mbi:0146263 ;
  lrmoo:R28i_was_produced_by [
    a lrmoo:F32_Carrier_Production_Event ;
    crm:P16_used_specific_object
      mbi:setting_siman190_variant ;
    crm:P14_carried_out_by
      mbi:printer_diGara
  ] ;
  mbi:scope "in_some_copies"@en ;
  mbi:likely_motivation
    "self_censorship"@en ;
  mbi:evidence_source
    "BHB MARC 500"@en .

mbi:setting_siman190_variant
  a crm:E22_Human-Made_Object ;
  crm:P130_shows_features_of
    mbi:setting_siman190_original .</code></pre>
  </div>
</div>

<p style="color:#6b7280; font-size: 0.85rem;">
  Grammar: <a href="../methods/bibliographic_units_and_marc.html#what-bowersgaskell-distinctions-look-like-in-bhb-free-text">methods §7</a> ·
  Ontology: <a href="../methods/bibliographic_units_and_marc.html#references-and-ontologies">methods §8</a> ·
  Open questions on output publication (SPARQL · static · return to NLI): TBD.
</p>
```
